artifacts.summary: 6-phase expansion plan for propositional Hilbert soundness/completeness across 3 logic levels

next_steps: Run /task --expand 112 to create the 6 sub-tasks, then /implement on each

memory_candidates.content: When expanding a meta-task into sub-tasks for propositional logic across multiple proof-system levels (classical, intuitionistic, minimal), the key architectural insight is to parameterize the DerivationTree over an axiom predicate (matching the existing modal pattern) rather than creating separate tree types. This enables the deduction theorem to work uniformly across all levels since it only uses K+S axioms. For Kripke semantics, parameterizing the forcing function over a bot_forces parameter elegantly handles both intuitionistic (fun _ => False) and minimal (upward-closed valuation) cases without separate model types.
